IMPORT_VANILLA_SAVES-IMPORT_BUTTON.label: Import Profile
IMPORT_VANILLA_SAVES-IMPORT_CONFIRM_POPU:
Press a button below to choose which vanilla profile to import from.



All data in [gold]Modded Save Profile {TargetId}[/gold] will be lost, and it will be replaced by the data from [gold]Unmodded Save Profile {SourceId}[/gold].

[red]This cannot be undone.[/red]
